title: Newegg's Sales Surge - Growth Analysis and Outlook 2026
text:
Newegg Commerce Sales Surge Analysis and Growth Outlook.

Fiscal 2025 Growth: Newegg reported strong fiscal 2025 results with net sales of $1.44 billion representing 16.9% year-over-year growth. GMV reached $1.77 billion, up 15.4% year-over-year. This marked a significant turnaround for the company after facing challenges in prior years.

Profitability Improvements: The company achieved a remarkable profitability improvement with net loss narrowing to $4.9 million from a $43.3 million loss in FY2024. Adjusted EBITDA swung from a $9.5 million loss to a $24.8 million profit, demonstrating operational leverage and cost discipline.

Driving Factors: Growth was driven by strong demand for next-generation GPU launches from NVIDIA and AMD, successful holiday promotional campaigns including an extended Black Friday event, proactive inventory management amid tariff concerns, and improved customer metrics including higher average order values and repeat purchase rates.

2026 Outlook: Management projects net sales of $1.23 billion to $1.47 billion, representing a potential slowdown from 2025 growth rates. However, the company expects a return to profitability with net income guidance of $6.1 million to $15.7 million, signaling management confidence in sustained operational improvements.
